## What does this do?

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] 🛠️ New tool / plugin
- [ ] 🪟 HUD / frontend
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🧩 Model / provider / voice
- [ ] 📖 Docs
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore

## How was it tested?

<!-- Commands, voice prompts, or steps you ran. Screenshots/GIFs welcome for HUD changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `main`.
- [ ] `cd web && npm run build` passes (if frontend touched).
- [ ] Backend starts clean with this change.
- [ ] New tools declare a sensible `Permission` tier (SAFE / CAUTION / DANGEROUS).
- [ ] No secrets, model weights, or `data/` artifacts in the diff.
- [ ] README / docs updated if setup or behavior changed.
